rct.body: Allocation concealment is not described. Please specify the method used (e.g., central randomization, opaque sealed envelopes) to minimize selection bias. [CONSORT 2010, Item 9]

The analysis population is not clearly stated. Please specify whether an intention-to-treat (ITT), per-protocol (PP), or modified ITT analysis was performed, and provide the rationale. [CONSORT 2010, Item 16]
Sample size justification is not provided. Please include a priori power calculation, including the assumed effect size, alpha level, and power. [CONSORT 2010, Item 7]
A CONSORT 2010 flow diagram is not included. Please add a flow diagram showing participant enrollment, allocation, follow-up, and analysis numbers. [CONSORT 2010, Item 13]
Blinding (masking) procedures are not described. Please clarify who was blinded (participants, caregivers, outcome assessors) and how blinding was maintained. [CONSORT 2010, Item 11]

cohort.body: Handling of confounding variables is not described. Please specify how potential confounders were identified and controlled (e.g., multivariable regression, propensity score matching). [STROBE Item 16]
Loss to follow-up is not reported. Please provide the number of participants lost to follow-up and reasons, and discuss potential impact on results. [STROBE Item 12]
STROBE checklist compliance is not mentioned. Consider reporting adherence to the STROBE statement for observational studies.

case_control.body: The method of control selection and matching is not adequately described. Please detail the matching criteria and ratio used. [STROBE Item 6]
Odds ratios with 95% confidence intervals are not reported. Please provide adjusted ORs for all primary outcomes. [STROBE Item 14]

cross_sectional.body: Response rate is not reported. Please provide the response rate and compare characteristics of responders versus non-responders to assess non-response bias.

case_report.body: Patient informed consent statement is not found. Please include an explicit statement that written informed consent was obtained from the patient for publication. [CARE Checklist Item 3]
Adherence to the CARE checklist is not mentioned. Please consider completing and referencing the CARE 2013 guidelines for case reports.
A clinical timeline is not included. A table or figure showing the chronological course of the patient's illness and treatment would improve clarity. [CARE Checklist Item 8]

basic.body: The number of experimental replicates or animals per group is not clearly stated in the Methods section. Please specify sample sizes for each group and the number of independent experiments performed.
The statistical software used for analysis is not specified. Please name the software and version (e.g., R version 4.3.1, GraphPad Prism 10). [General best practice]

_common.body: Ethics committee approval or informed consent statement is not found in the manuscript. Please add an ethics statement in the Methods section, including the name of the ethics committee and approval number.
